allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'' -Filter ''NinjaTrader*'' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'' -Filter ''NinjaTrader*'' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName")
